title: iPhone Mod
description: The iPhone Mod adds iPhones to Minecraft.
body:
### **This is not affiliated with Apple**

# iPhone Mod
![Download Count](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/OS4Ax2EB?style=for-the-badge&color=blue&label=Downloads)

**NOTE: Messages are only sent locally in 1.2a and 1.2b. Please avoid using those versions to make sure messages are not local-only. This is a bug, and not a feature.**

## Summary:
The iPhone Mod is a simple mod that adds iPhones to Minecraft. You craft batteries with 3 iron ingots and 6 redstone blocks. You craft iPhones with 1 battery and 8 iron ingots.
## Items:
- Battery
- iPhone

## How to use
Right click with the iPhone to open the iPhone menu. Type in a message into the text box. Press the send button to send the message into chat. When you send a message, it shows your username next to the message. The format for messages in markdown format is ```**<username>**: message```.
